description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:1.10.3 image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay, and defines a before_script that exports PROJECT_PATH, TEST_IMAGE_NAME, MASTER_IMG_NAME and RELEASE_IMG_NAME based on CI variables. Define three stages: build, release and deploy. In the build stage add a build_image job (excluded from the master branch) that runs `docker build -t $TEST_IMAGE_NAME .`, then `docker login -e gitlab-ci@gitlab.com -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, and finally `docker push $TEST_IMAGE_NAME`. In the release stage add a master-image job (runs only on master) that logs in to the registry, executes `docker pull $TEST_IMAGE_NAME || docker build -t $TEST_IMAGE_NAME .`, tags the image with `docker tag $TEST_IMAGE_NAME $MASTER_IMG_NAME`, and pushes it with `docker push $MASTER_IMG_NAME`. In the deploy stage add a deploy-master job that uses the debian:9 image, depends on master-image, runs only on the master branch of gitmate/open-source/gitmate-2-frontend, sets up ssh-agent, adds the $DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY, writes $DEPLOY_SERVER_HOSTKEYS to known_hosts, and SSHs to tomoko@marisa.gitmate.io on $SSH_PORT to execute `.ci/deploy.master.sh`, while defining a master environment with URL https://api.master.gitmate.io.
